text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, about tomorrow's training. 
I'd like to do something to clear my mind.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: So, could you bring some clay tiles tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I thought long and hard about the best way to
do it, and I settled on smashing some tiles with
my bare fists, followed by a refreshing run.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Good idea, right?! I'd even call it great! Starting tomorrow, I'm gonna smash through that new routine!
